pi_items.source: Web query to weather.gov API and Avare application defaults confirming KSQL is the identifier.
Web query to weather.gov API confirming KSQL is San Carlos Airport.
verifier.py strictly enforces checking for the 'A/FD' tab in the VLM prompt and A/FD (Airport/Facility Directory) is a real aviation feature.
verifier.py VLM prompt logic explicitly checks for searching KSQL, selecting San Carlos, viewing the A/FD tab, and displaying facility data.

privileged_info_summary: The task interacts with real-world Avare aviation GPS app data. It was verified via public API that KSQL is the identifier for San Carlos Airport. The VLM verification criteria exactly match the instructions provided to the VLM in verifier.py to ensure the agent searches for KSQL, selects the A/FD tab, and displays the correct facility details.
